items.name: student-profile-identification-xai
items.description: An Explainable AI (XAI) framework for identifying student profiles in Online Judge systems using Machine Learning and Multi-Instance Learning techniques to predict student performance and provide interpretable feedback for students and instructors.

items.name: sequence-embedding-search
items.description: A powerful autoencoder-LSTM framework for crafting robust time-series embeddings. Transforming sequential data into compact, meaningful representations for advanced analytics and machine learning applications

items.name: tauro
items.description: Es un framework avanzado para la ejecución de pipelines de datos que combina automatización, escalabilidad y flexibilidad. Diseñado para simplificar la gestión de flujos de trabajo complejos de datos, desde ETL tradicionales hasta pipelines de Machine Learning.

items.name: Chonky
items.description: A Natural Language Processing (NLP)  framework for machine-learning workflows based in python

items.name: Causal_ML_Literature_Review_Data_Analyses
items.description: R/RDS-based data pipeline and analysis framework for a causal machine learning literature review in oncology, including paper metadata, framework scores, evidence excerpts, and joined analysis tables.

items.name: mlfo
items.description: Attempt 2 at making a machine learning framework

items.name: PhosFate
items.description: PhosBind is a machine learning framework that leverages ESM2 protein embeddings to predict and classify anion-binding sites, with a focus on phosphate recognition. It enables data-driven insights into protein–anion interactions for applications in biomolecular design and nutrient recovery.

items.name: sagemaker-distribution
items.description: A set of Docker images that include popular frameworks for machine learning, data science and visualization.

items.name: Leveraging-Financial-Inclusion-in-Rural-Scotland-Using-GeoSpatial-Analytics
items.description: Geospatial analytics and machine learning framework for rural financial access analysis in Scotland.

items.name: Physics-Informed-ML-for-Silicon-Solar-Cell-Optimization
items.description: Physics-informed machine learning framework for recombination engineering and efficiency optimization in crystalline silicon solar cells using interpretable AI and device-level simulations.

items.name: rural-financial-access-scotland
items.description: Description: Geospatial analytics and machine learning framework for rural financial access analysis in Scotland.

items.name: power-trading
items.description: A systematic quantitative trading framework that models renewable forecast errors and system imbalance dynamics to extract alpha from price formation in the GB electricity market, with a machine learning driven pipeline for signal generation and backtesting.

items.name: flowMagic
items.description: flowMagic is an R package for automated bivariate gating of flow cytometry (FCM) data. It uses a machine-learning model trained on both experts data and a large, high-quality FCM dataset generated by EVE Online players. The package also provides an extensive visualization toolkit and integrates seamlessly with the flowCore/flowWorkspace frameworks

items.name: Dataset-Quality-Analyzer
items.description: This project focuses on the development of scalable and explainable data quality analysis techniques for modern machine learning and data integration systems. The framework provides automated methods for detecting missing values, duplicate records, schema inconsistencies, semantic conflicts, and anomalous patterns within large datasets.

items.name: peakmap
items.description: Codebase for Bates Physics Department thesis: PeakMap: A Two-Stage Machine Learning Framework for Methane Peak Detection.

items.name: Diabetes_Prediction_Framework
items.description: Machine learning diabetes prediction project using multiple classifiers

items.name: MLServer
items.description: An inference server for your machine learning models, including support for multiple frameworks, multi-model serving and more

items.name: lung-cancer-prediction-pipeline
items.description: This repository features a high-integrity machine learning pipeline developed to assist clinical researchers in stratifying patient risk for lung cancer. By utilizing an optimized Logistic Regression framework and UMAP, the project emphasizes model interpretability—a critical requirement for clinical validation and regulatory transparency.

items.name: PriviNetra-AI-Based-Privilege-Threat-Detection-Framework
items.description: AI-based Privilege Escalation Attack Detection and Mitigation System using Machine Learning

items.name: ai-ml-engineering-portfolio
items.description: A collection of AI/ML engineering projects covering deep learning, MLOps, LLM frameworks, RAG applications, scalable pipelines, FastAPIs, Docker and production-focused machine learning systems.

items.name: Mental-Health-Classifier
items.description: Repositorio destinado a el análisis, entrenamiento y despliegue de un modelo de machine learning, con el objetivo de la clasificacion de pensamientos / textos de problemeas de salud mental,especificamente sobre el suicidio. Ademas de base para framework de multientrenamiento, compartacion e inteligencia.

items.description: Open-source AI QA framework for testing Machine Learning APIs using FastAPI, Pytest, and Locust.

items.name: A-Hybrid-Machine-Learning-Framework-for-Accurate-Healthcare-Disease-Prediction
items.description: My conference & paper presentation Hybrid ML framework for healthcare disease prediction combines random forest, gradient boosting & logistic regression uses weighted soft voting mechanism improves accuracy, precision, recall & f1-scoresupports intelligent clinical decision systems

items.name: automated-model-monitoring-drift-detection
items.description: End-to-end monitoring framework that tracks machine learning model performance in production, detects data and concept drift using statistical tests, and surfaces alerts when model retraining is required.

items.name: ml-perf-framework
items.description: A Decision-Aware Machine Learning Framework for Pre-Execution Latency Prediction across Systems A, B, and C

items.description: A hybrid machine learning framework for vehicle-specific accident risk prediction, combining historical and real-time environmental data to generate intelligent alerts for safer navigation in mountainous and high-risk road conditions.

items.description: Applying machine learning models to NLP

items.description: Explainable Healthcare AI framework for Diabetes and Chronic Kidney Disease prediction using Machine Learning, SHAP, and LIME interpretability techniques.

items.description: "Production-grade machine learning microservice architecture utilizing a Random Forest Classifier and FastAPI framework to serve real-time customer churn predictions."

items.description: An All-in-One Algo-Trading Framework: Backtest -> Train -> Trade -> Monitor. Machine / Deep Learning Ready. Supports All Trading: TradFi+CeFi+DeFi. Code Once, Trade Anywhere.

items.description: Evaluating Airbnb's review data readiness for ML benchmarking via our novel ADDI framework and practical proxy tasks. HKBU BBA ISBI FYP project.

items.name: Sentinel-Framework
items.description: The Sentinel Framework builds on this progress by adding biometric authentication and machine learning to captive portals, aiming to provide secure and password-free network access.

items.name: Advanced-Image-Recognition-for-Black-Rot-in-Mustard-Plants-Using-CNN-Siamese-NN-and-Machine-Learning
items.description: This repository presents a comparative computer vision and machine learning framework for the automated diagnosis of Bacterial Blight / Black Rot in mustard plants, a high-impact agricultural disease caused by Xanthomonas campestris pv. campestris (Xcc).

items.description: credit card fraud detection, explainable AI, enterprise risk intelligence, and scalable machine learning solutions for financial transaction ecosystems.

items.description: Machine learning framework for predicting coiled-coil oligomeric states using register-specific physicochemical features.

items.name: tensorflow-federated
items.description: An open-source framework for machine learning and other computations on decentralized data.

items.name: minimd
items.description: A minimal molecular dynamics driver using machine-learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) via the ASE framework.

items.name: Bias-Detection-in-AI-Systems
items.description: A comprehensive framework for detecting and assessing bias in machine learning models, designed for research and educational purposes.

items.name: AI-Transparency-Tools
items.description: A comprehensive Explainable AI (XAI) toolkit focused on post-hoc global and local explanations for machine learning models. This project provides state-of-the-art interpretability methods with proper evaluation frameworks and interactive demonstrations.

items.name: Model-Behavioral-Testing-Framework
items.description: A comprehensive framework for model behavioral testing that evaluates machine learning models across various scenarios, edge cases, and adversarial conditions. This project focuses on trust and safety aspects of AI systems through systematic behavioral evaluation.

items.name: Red-Teaming-for-AI-Systems
items.description: A comprehensive framework for adversarial robustness testing and red teaming of machine learning models. This project implements various adversarial attacks, robustness evaluation metrics, and visualization tools to assess the security and reliability of AI systems.

items.name: spectral-graph-descriptors
items.description: Automated cell shape analysis using spectral graph theory. A modular Python framework for graph-based feature extraction and machine learning classification.

items.description: A small educational machine learning framework with an end goal of creating a basic neural network classifier, classifing between different shapes.

items.description: This repository includes all the codes developed for the study title "A Hybrid Experimental and Machine Learning Framework for Designing and Predicting Compressive Strength of Ultra-High-Performance Concrete" authored by Mohamed Ayman, and Amr ElNemr

items.name: Quantum-Machine-Learning-Framework
items.description: Cutting-edge quantum machine learning framework with quantum circuit simulation, variational quantum algorithms, and hybrid quantum-classical optimization

items.description: This repository contains multiple deep learning and machine learning projects implemented using the PyTorch framework. The notebooks demonstrate practical applications of neural networks, convolutional neural networks (CNNs), logistic regression, and classification techniques on real-world datasets.

items.name: machine-learning-framework-workflow
items.description: A beginner-friendly guide to understanding the complete Machine Learning framework and workflow step by step.

items.name: LayerWise-QC
items.description: A prototype framework for in-situ quality control in laser powder bed fusion, combining optical tomography, powder-bed imaging, process parameters, and multimodal machine learning to estimate layer-wise defect risk.

items.name: AMR-Risk-Stratification
items.description: Machine learning framework for antimicrobial resistance risk stratification using multi-omics data from 18,916 bacterial isolates

items.name: ML_Customer_Churn_prediction
items.description: An end-to-end machine learning classification pipeline built to predict customer churn (retention attrition). Recognizing that losing a customer is highly costly, this framework identifies at-risk accounts early, allowing businesses to execute proactive retention strategies before the customer leaves.

items.description: A CNN-based machine learning framework for Cavity Ring-Down Spectroscopy (CRDS), designed to analyze biomarkers and quantify their spectral intensities from spectroscopic signals.

items.name: perovskite-degradation-ml
items.description: Explainable Machine Learning framework for decoupling outdoor degradation in Perovskite Solar Cells.

items.name: auroraml
items.description: A Python CLI tool and library that simplifies the process of hyperparameter tuning, model selection, and deployment for machine learning projects, providing automated workflows, customizable templates, and seamless integration with popular frameworks like TensorFlow and PyTorch.

items.description: Machine learning framework for predicting defect-prone software modules and prioritizing Agile sprint testing using ensemble learning, SMOTE, and risk-based ranking.

items.description: Machine learning model evaluation framework for semantic search engine

items.name: ai_assessment_implementation_resources
items.description: This repository collects practical resources for assessing, testing, documenting, and implementing responsible machine learning systems, including frameworks, evaluation tools, educational materials, and community guidance.

items.name: ShortKit-ML
items.description: A unified framework to detect, benchmark, and mitigate shortcut learning in machine learning   models across medical imaging and beyond.

items.name: Machine-Learning-Based-Prediction-Framework-for-Date-Palm-International-Market-Prices
items.description: Developed a supervised machine learning–based prediction framework for international date palm market prices. The project involved training and evaluating regression models on historical price data to forecast future price trends.

items.description: Explainable Machine Learning Framework for Chronic Kidney Disease Prediction using SHAP-based Interpretability

items.description: An advanced predictive framework designed to forecast landslide susceptibility and displacement. By integrating machine learning with real-time geographical and meteorological data, this project aims to provide early-warning systems to save lives and infrastructure in high-risk zones.

items.description: Machine learning framework for forecasting critical transitions in nonlinear dynamical systems using parameter-aware reservoir computing.

items.description: AI-driven digital twin framework for smart irrigation using machine learning, SHAP explainability, and climate-aware water optimization.

items.name: PHIS---Planetary-Habitability-Intelligence-System
items.description: Machine Learning Framework for Exoplanet Habitability Classification and Earth Similarity Index Prediction.

items.name: ivy
items.description: Convert Machine Learning Code Between Frameworks

items.name: Tensor-Network-Model-In-Depp-Learning
items.description: Development of machine learning models using Tensor Networks (MPS) on the Oxford Flowers dataset as a preliminary benchmark. This project serves as a testing framework before applying tensor-based models to real laboratory image classification tasks.

items.name: Adaptive-Climate-Engineering-Model
items.description: An adaptive climate engineering framework that integrates digital twin atmospheric simulation, machine learning, and swarm intelligence optimization to autonomously regulate environmental conditions through predictive modeling, closed-loop feedback control, and resource-efficient climate intervention strategies.

items.name: Malware_Detection
items.description: This project is a web based malware detection system developed using machine learning and the Streamlit framework. It analyzes uploaded files and predicts whether a file is safe or malware using a Random Forest model trained on Windows PE file features for academic demonstration purposes.

items.name: MutliPillar_Fintech_Behaviour_Framework
items.description: Machine learning and forecasting framework for multi-source consumer expenditure analytics.

items.name: scikit-learn_bench
items.description: scikit-learn_bench benchmarks various implementations of machine learning algorithms across data analytics frameworks. It currently support the scikit-learn, DAAL4PY, cuML, and XGBoost frameworks for commonly used machine learning algorithms.

items.name: Covary
items.description: A translation-aware framework for alignment-free phylogenetics using machine learning

items.name: iec62443-risk-assessment
items.description: AI-enhanced IEC 62443 risk assessment framework for oil and gas ICS security using Python, Flask, threat intelligence, and machine learning.

items.name: MLFromCore
items.description: A growing machine learning framework built entirely from scratch in pure Python — no external libraries such as NumPy or scikit-learn.  The goal is to deeply understand how machine learning algorithms work internally by implementing them from first principles.

items.name: ML-framework-for-SWF-retrieval
items.description: Machine learning framework for estimating global Surface Water Fraction (SWF) from passive microwave brightness temperatures (WindSat/CIMR). Covers end-to-end data preprocessing, EDA, and a full regression pipeline including model selection, feature engineering, HPO, SHAP explainability, and error analysis.

items.name: axion
items.description: Axion is a machine learning framework designed to be simple and fast.

items.name: suicidal-intent-prediction-smote-enc-shap
items.description: Code for the paper "Construction of Interpretable Machine Learning Prediction Framework and Identification of Influence Factors for Suicidal Intent Under Imbalanced Data Conditions". Implements SMOTE-ENC data augmentation, 6 machine learning models, and SHAP interpretability analysis for college student suicidal ideation screening.

items.name: creative-ml-orchestrator
items.description: A framework for orchestrating creative machine learning workflows and generative model pipelines

items.name: nnpdf
items.description: An open-source machine learning framework for global analyses of parton distributions.

items.name: tbg-stm-ftldos-hubbard-U-regression
items.description: Machine learning framework for inferring interaction-dependent features from simulated STM-derived Fourier-transformed local density of states (FT-LDOS) images in TBG moiré systems.

items.name: Data-encryption-through-the-encoding-of-high-and-moderate-plaintext-information-blocks
items.description: A hybrid image encryption framework fusing machine learning and chaotic cryptography. It utilizes ML to classify image blocks by information density, enabling adaptive selective encryption. Combining bit-plane manipulation, chaotic maps, and multiple S-boxes, it optimizes speed and security for real-time IoT and resource-constrained environments.

items.name: PUREML-Machine-Learning-Toolkit-from-Scratch
items.description: PUREML is a custom machine learning library built entirely from scratch in Python. It focuses on implementing core machine learning algorithms and mathematical concepts without relying on external ML frameworks such as scikit-learn or TensorFlow.

items.name: Statistical-Model-Analysis
items.description: Repository for analyzing and using statistical Models. Includes rigorous derivations and implementation of Gamma-Log architectures, Fisher Scoring algorithms, and comprehensive model diagnostics (Deviance, Chi-Square, Residuals). Compares statistical inference frameworks against Machine Learning.

items.name: Empirical-analysis-of-machine-learning-methods-for-change-point-detection-in-financial-time-series.
items.description: Large-scale empirical study of machine learning approaches for change-point detection in financial time series, comparing neural architectures (LSTM, GRU, Transformer, TFT, Mamba) with classical methods under a unified stochastic simulation framework.

items.name: piml-harmonic-mitigation
items.description: Physics-informed machine learning framework for predicting and reducing harmonic distortion (THD) in residential power systems using AO-NFRS and Bayesian-optimized ANFIS.

items.name: Rule--Based-Python-learning-bot
items.description: # Rule-Based Python Chatbot (Non-AI)  A simple, explicit Python chatbot that responds to user input using strict rule-based logic and keyword matching. This project is a hands-on exploration of conditional programming and string manipulation in Python, completely free of AI or Machine Learning frameworks.

items.name: AI-POWERED-PHISHING-DETECTION-ENGINE-ENTERPRISE-ACTIVE
items.description: An industry-level security framework merging **Machine Learning classification**, **email header validation**, and **Threat Intelligence telemetry** to detect, verify, and explain phishing vectors in real-time.

items.name: HybridSecretFramework
items.description: Hybrid five-layer framework that scans artifacts retrieved from GitHub for exposed secrets. It uses Machine Learning and AST-based analysis to reduce false positives.

items.name: Crystal-Structure-Predictive-Modeling-of-Li-ion-Battery-Cathodes
items.description: Machine learning framework for crystal system prediction of lithium-ion battery materials using ensemble learning, SMOTE-based preprocessing, hyperparameter optimization, and SHAP explainability analysis for interpretable materials informatics and crystal structure classification.

items.name: apax
items.description: A flexible and performant framework for training machine learning potentials.

items.name: insurance-risk-analytics
items.description: End-to-end auto insurance risk analytics and predictive modeling pipeline for AlphaCare Insurance Solutions (ACIS). Features modular exploratory data analysis, rigorous statistical A/B testing on South African policyholder profiles, and machine learning risk frameworks to optimize underwriting performance and identify low-risk marketing targets.

items.name: LightGBM
items.description: A fast, distributed, high performance gradient boosting (GBT, GBDT, GBRT, GBM or MART) framework based on decision tree algorithms, used for ranking, classification and many other machine learning tasks.

items.name: NumCompute
items.description: Streaming machine learning framework using Decision Trees and Random Forests built with NumPy.

items.name: Framework_for_Seismic_Assessment_of_RC_Buildings
items.description: A national-scale, data-driven framework integrating 54,000+ OpenSeesPy nonlinear structural simulations with machine learning for real-time seismic damage assessment in Nepal.

items.name: FFNOML
items.description: A machine learning framework for predicting NLTE departure coefficients in 3-D stellar atmospheres using Factorized Fourier Neural Operators (FFNO)

items.name: Machine_Learning_Invariants_of_Tensors
items.description: A data-driven framework for discovering functionally independent tensor invariants using graph enumeration, tensor networks, random sampling, and numerical linear algebra.

items.name: Eco-Ops-Green-Computing-Analytics-
items.description: Eco-Ops is a carbon-aware ML framework that tracks energy usage and CO₂ emissions during model training. It uses CodeCarbon and Streamlit to provide benchmarking, visualization, and sustainability analysis for machine learning models.

items.name: HospitalReadmissionPrediction
items.description: This study uses machine learning framework to address the challenge of hospital readmission, analysing a clinical dataset of 5,000 diabetic patient records.
